reviews.review_text: Dr. Angelina The was consulted while I was a patient in BRRH. She was kind, reassuring and thorough while addressing my abnormal blood readings. In a follow-up visit to her office, the helpful and highly skilled staff in the blood lab and Dr. The’s confidant and thoughtful diagnosis put my mind at ease. So thankful I found my way to her care.

reviews.review_text: Dr The is wonderful. I don’t know if I would have made it through breast cancer without her support. She is understanding and compassionate. I feel blessed that she is my oncologist!

reviews.review_text:
I have been under Dr. Angelina The’s care for almost three years, and I cannot express enough how grateful I am for her support throughout my journey. She is incredibly sweet, patient, and always takes the time to listen and explain everything clearly.

During such a difficult time, having a doctor who is not only knowledgeable but also genuinely compassionate makes all the difference. Dr. The consistently makes me feel comfortable, respected, and cared for.

I truly appreciate her dedication and the kindness she shows at every visit. I highly recommend her to anyone looking for an oncologist who combines expertise with a caring and human touch.
